name: imessage-max
description: Local MCP server for reading, searching, and sending iMessages on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Read, search, and send iMessages through MCP
interface.longDescription: Use iMessage Max in Codex to inspect local iMessage conversations, resolve contacts, search messages, fetch attachments, and send Messages.app replies through a local macOS MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Find the right iMessage thread before I reply.
Search my recent iMessages for a topic.
Summarize unread iMessages that need attention.
